name: Beef-Barley Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can Tomatoes, canned, cut into pieces (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into 1-inch cubes.
2. In a large skillet, brown the meat in hot oil, about half at a time. Drain well.
3. In the crockpot, combine carrots, celery, onion, green pepper, and parsley.
4. Add broth, undrained tomatoes, tomato sauce, barley, basil, salt, and pepper.
5. Stir in the browned meat. Cover.
6. Cook on low heat setting for 10-12 hours or on high heat setting for 4½-5 hours.
7. Skim off any excess fat before serving.
